brief: ALGOPOLIS game audio: procedural Web Audio SFX + ambient pad + mute, deploy & verify

evidence: Web Audio SFX engine added: AUDIO ctx + blip()/snd() with 9 cues (click/select/build/research/run/event/victory/collapse/error); gesture-started+resumed AudioContext on first pointerdown; mute toggle #muteBtn (localStorage algopolis_muted); snd() hooked into onBtn/placeZone/researchTech/runCycle/showEvent/endGame/flash. node --check SYNTAX OK.

Ambient pad startPad(): low-volume drone (2 detuned sines through LFO-modulated lowpass) + interval arpeggio (pentatonic, blip vol .05), routed via AUDIO.master so mute-gated; auto-starts on first pointerdown gesture (typeof-guarded call). node --check SYNTAX OK.

Audio verified via puppeteer (instrumented window.AudioContext): ctx created on first gesture, oscillators fire on select/run (osc 9->15), ambient pad starts (3 osc), mute toggles 🔊<->🔇 + localStorage, 0 pageerrors. Deployed to Higgsfield (game_id 99dcde78, live render OK with 🔊 in header). Pushed GitHub b447e62.
verify_evidence: t9: before {ctx:0} -> after selects {ctx:1,osc:9} -> after run {ctx:1,osc:15}, errors:[]. tmute: muteBtn onclick true; click1 -> 🔇 ls:1; click2 -> 🔊 ls:0; errs:[].

brief: ALGOPOLIS: Higgsfield facade textures on 3D buildings + day/night lighting, verify & deploy

evidence: 4 Higgsfield facade textures (res/civ/ind/data, lit windows) downloaded to assets/fac_*.png; loaded as THREE.Texture into TEX2; makeBuilding applies them as map+emissiveMap on building boxes (white base when textured, flat-color fallback). Day screenshot shows window/panel detail on grounded buildings. SYNTAX OK.

Day/night setNight(): AMB/DL/DL2+fog+#bg3d shift; building emissiveIntensity 0.16 day / 0.95 night, emiCol thriving teal / starved red / normal warm via emissiveMap = glowing windows; ☀/🌙 toggle + localStorage + ?night hook. Day & night screenshots distinct (even-lit vs dark-blue glowing windows).

Deployed Higgsfield (game_id 99dcde78) + pushed GitHub 9d4ff39. Live night screenshot shows textured grounded buildings with glowing windows + dark-blue lighting + ☀/🌙 toggle. zip 7.46MB (facades 512px).
verify_cmd: node --check (inline module) ; chrome --headless --screenshot day & night ; live screenshot
verify_evidence: SYNTAX OK; day shot = facade window/panel detail on grounded 3D buildings; night shot = dark blue scene + glowing windows + brighter core; LIVE night render confirms textures+lighting served (engine iframe, verified by render not curl).
